revision.text:
'''庚寅'''（かのえとら、こういん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて27番目で、前は[[己丑]]、次は[[辛卯]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は木で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==庚寅の年==
==庚寅の日== ===[[選日]]=== 庚寅の日は[[十方暮]]の7日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''庚寅'''（かのえとら、こうきんのとら、こういん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの27番目で、前は[[己丑]]、次は[[辛卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==庚寅の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って30が余る年が庚寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚寅の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[30年]] *[[90年]] *[[150年]] *[[210年]] *[[270年]] *[[330年]] *[[390年]] *[[450年]] *[[510年]] *[[570年]] *[[630年]] *[[690年]] *[[750年]] *[[810年]] *[[870年]] *[[930年]] *[[990年]] | *[[1050年]] *[[1110年]] *[[1170年]] *[[1230年]] *[[1290年]] *[[1350年]] *[[1410年]] *[[1470年]] *[[1530年]] *[[1590年]] *[[1650年]] *[[1710年]] *[[1770年]] *[[1830年]] *[[1890年]] *[[1950年]] | *[[2010年]] *[[2070年]] *[[2130年]] *[[2190年]] *[[2250年]] *[[2310年]] *[[2370年]] *[[2430年]] *[[2490年]] *[[2550年]] *[[2610年]] *[[2670年]] *[[2730年]] *[[2790年]] *[[2850年]] *[[2910年]] *[[2970年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[持統天皇]]4年（690年） - [[庚寅年籍]]が完成・施行。
==庚寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[1月]]が庚寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚寅の日== 庚寅の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚寅の日は[[十方暮]]の7日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:庚寅]]

干支の組み合わせの27番目で、前は[[己丑]]、次は[[辛卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==庚寅の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って30が余る年が庚寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚寅の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[30年]] *[[90年]] *[[150年]] *[[210年]] *[[270年]] *[[330年]] *[[390年]] *[[450年]] *[[510年]] *[[570年]] *[[630年]] *[[690年]] *[[750年]] *[[810年]] *[[870年]] *[[930年]] *[[990年]] | *[[1050年]] *[[1110年]] *[[1170年]] *[[1230年]] *[[1290年]] *[[1350年]] *[[1410年]] *[[1470年]] *[[1530年]] *[[1590年]] *[[1650年]] *[[1710年]] *[[1770年]] *[[1830年]] *[[1890年]] *[[1950年]] | *[[2010年]] *[[2070年]] *[[2130年]] *[[2190年]] *[[2250年]] *[[2310年]] *[[2370年]] *[[2430年]] *[[2490年]] *[[2550年]] *[[2610年]] *[[2670年]] *[[2730年]] *[[2790年]] *[[2850年]] *[[2910年]] *[[2970年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[持統天皇]]4年（690年） - [[庚寅年籍]]が完成・施行。
==庚寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[1月]]が庚寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚寅の日== 庚寅の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚寅の日は[[十方暮]]の7日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:庚寅]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:庚寅]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''庚寅'''（かのえとら、こうきんのとら、こういん）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの27番目で、前は[[己丑]]、次は[[辛卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==庚寅の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って30が余る年が庚寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚寅の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[30年]] *[[90年]] *[[150年]] *[[210年]] *[[270年]] *[[330年]] *[[390年]] *[[450年]] *[[510年]] *[[570年]] *[[630年]] *[[690年]] *[[750年]] *[[810年]] *[[870年]] *[[930年]] *[[990年]] | *[[1050年]] *[[1110年]] *[[1170年]] *[[1230年]] *[[1290年]] *[[1350年]] *[[1410年]] *[[1470年]] *[[1530年]] *[[1590年]] *[[1650年]] *[[1710年]] *[[1770年]] *[[1830年]] *[[1890年]] *[[1950年]] | *[[2010年]] *[[2070年]] *[[2130年]] *[[2190年]] *[[2250年]] *[[2310年]] *[[2370年]] *[[2430年]] *[[2490年]] *[[2550年]] *[[2610年]] *[[2670年]] *[[2730年]] *[[2790年]] *[[2850年]] *[[2910年]] *[[2970年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[持統天皇]]4年（690年） - [[庚寅年籍]]が完成・施行。
==庚寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[1月]]が庚寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚寅の日== 庚寅の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚寅の日は[[十方暮]]の7日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Metal Tiger-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Kk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Metal Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[de:Metall-Tiger]] [[ja:庚寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]]

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] to [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの27番目で、前は[[己丑]]、次は[[辛卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。

==庚寅の日== 庚寅の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚寅の日は[[十方暮]]の7日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:かのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Metal Tiger-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Kk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Metal Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[de:Metall-Tiger]] [[ja:庚寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]]

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの27番目で、前は[[己丑]]、次は[[辛卯]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[寅]]は陽の[[木]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==庚寅の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って30が余る年が庚寅の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚寅の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[30年]] *[[90年]] *[[150年]] *[[210年]] *[[270年]] *[[330年]] *[[390年]] *[[450年]] *[[510年]] *[[570年]] *[[630年]] *[[690年]] *[[750年]] *[[810年]] *[[870年]] *[[930年]] *[[990年]] | *[[1050年]] *[[1110年]] *[[1170年]] *[[1230年]] *[[1290年]] *[[1350年]] *[[1410年]] *[[1470年]] *[[1530年]] *[[1590年]] *[[1650年]] *[[1710年]] *[[1770年]] *[[1830年]] *[[1890年]] *[[1950年]] | *[[2010年]] *[[2070年]] *[[2130年]] *[[2190年]] *[[2250年]] *[[2310年]] *[[2370年]] *[[2430年]] *[[2490年]] *[[2550年]] *[[2610年]] *[[2670年]] *[[2730年]] *[[2790年]] *[[2850年]] *[[2910年]] *[[2970年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[持統天皇]]4年（690年） - [[庚寅年籍]]が完成・施行。
==庚寅の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[1月]]が庚寅の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立春]]から[[啓蟄]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚寅の日== 庚寅の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 庚寅の日は[[十方暮]]の7日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|かのえとら}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Metal Tiger-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:庚寅]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:庚寅]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Kk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Metal Tiger-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Metal Tiger}][[Category:qq]] [[de:Metall-Tiger]] [[ja:庚寅]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Metal Tiger]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yang Metal Tiger]]

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). === Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). '''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). === Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaaltier (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ìng]][[de:Metall-Tiger]][[fr:Tigre de métal]][[hak:Kâng-yìm]][[ja:庚寅]][[ko:경인]][[nds:Metall-Tiger]][[vi:Canh Dần]][[za:Gengyinz]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-în]][[zh-yue:庚寅]][[zh:庚寅]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1063199]] Wikidata name: Yang Metal Tiger [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Tiger|kanji=庚寅|romaji=kanoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=gēngyín|w=keng-yin|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ȵin²¹|y=geng1 jan4|j=geng1 jan4|ci=kɪŋ jɐn|mc=kæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). === Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). '''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). === Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). === Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). '''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang [[:en:Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood]] and the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang [[:en:Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire]], and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood). [[ja:庚寅]] ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events === * In the 4th Year of [[:en:Empress Jitō|Empress Jitō]] (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.
==Months of Yang Metal Tiger== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:January|January]] becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Lichun|Risshun]] until the day before [[:en:Jingzhe|Keichitsu]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Tiger== The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
