{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Tiger|kanji=庚寅|romaji=kanoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=gēngyín|w=keng-yin|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ȵin²¹|y=geng1 jan4|j=geng1 jan4|ci=kɪŋ jɐn|mc=kæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Tiger|kanji=庚寅|romaji=kanoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=gēngyín|w=keng-yin|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ȵin²¹|y=geng1 jan4|j=geng1 jan4|ci=kɪŋ jɐn|mc=kæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyeongin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Tiger|kanji=庚寅|romaji=kanoe tora|onyomi=kōin|p=gēngyín|w=keng-yin|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ ȵin²¹|y=geng1 jan4|j=geng1 jan4|ci=kɪŋ jɐn|mc=kæŋ ŋin|oc-bs=kˤraŋ ŋin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==

***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
[[ja:庚寅]]
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (庚寅)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngyín
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (경인)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Dần

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as 庚寅 (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jichū|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|己丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jichū|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|辛卯|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (甲)|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|WD=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|寅|1=yín|lt=Tiger (寅)|2=ja|3=寅|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (寅)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|WD=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jitō|en|Empress Jitō|WD=Q232026|lt=Empress Jitō|1=Empress Jitō}} (690 AD) – the "Kōgo Nenseki" (庚寅年籍) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|WD=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of Kōgo. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|WD=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a Kōgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Kōgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Toppōkure|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toppōkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
